ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit */,
  "line_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line type */,
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenure */,
  "year_built_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year built category */,
  "household_income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income category */,
  "children_present_id" INTEGER /* ID of the children category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the housing unit */,
  "num_occupants" INTEGER /* Number of occupants in the housing unit */,
  "num_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the housing unit */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the housing unit */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the housing unit */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_line_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_type_id") REFERENCES line_types ("line_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_children_present_id FOREIGN KEY ("children_present_id") REFERENCES children_categories ("children_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_tenure_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenure_id") REFERENCES tenures ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_year_built_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_built_id") REFERENCES year_built_categories ("year_built_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_household_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_income_id") REFERENCES income_categories ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the region is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the region */,
  "median_year_built" INTEGER /* Median year structures were built in the region */,
  "median_square_footage" INTEGER /* Median square footage of housing units in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_types" (
  "line_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line type */,
  "line_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the line type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenures" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure */,
  "tenure_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "year_built_categories" (
  "year_built_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year built category */,
  "year_built_category" TEXT /* Category for the year the structure was built */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year built category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_built_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_category" TEXT /* Category for household income */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children_categories" (
  "children_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each children category */,
  "children_category" TEXT /* Category for the presence of children in the household */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the children category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("children_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing unit being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the housing unit */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the housing unit was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES housing_units ("unit_id")
)
